KeysToEntries.Melee_HuntingKnife_Description: Used primarily for skinning animals and cutting up their meat.
KeysToEntries.Melee_RustyMachete_Description: Can be used to cut through the thick jungle growth or in combat. Unfortunately, this one has seen better days.
KeysToEntries.Melee_OntarioMark3_Description: This standard issue knife of the U.S. Navy features a stainless steel blade with a high-impact black plastic handle.
KeysToEntries.Melee_VityazT_Description: Manufactured by Ooo Pp “Kizlyar,“ this Russian tactical knife features a 163 mm corrosion-resistant steel blade with an ergonomically improved handle.
KeysToEntries.Melee_UsmcFightingKnife_Description: First issued by the United States Marine Corps in 1942, this legendary combat/utility knife is still favored to this day, both by the armed forces and the civilian sector.
